summary: Enthusiastic fan memory of a powerful chant‑filled show; recording source and sound quality not detailed
review: The reviewer recalls being sixteen and sober at this concert, highlighting an extended “Ashes to ashes all fall down” chant and the refrain “Know our love will not fade away!” with great excitement. No comments are made about the audio source or its clarity, so the technical quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review expresses strong positive sentiment about the performance, but provides no information on recording quality, limiting confidence in the overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer emphasizes a long, memorable chant segment, suggesting a high‑energy, immersive moment but offers no broader setlist commentary.
